vi.name: React Roadmap
vi.summary: Frontend track để xây modern UI, làm chủ hooks, performance, server components và interview prep.

milestones.title: Mental Model
milestones.description: Xây nền tư duy với Why React, Thinking in React, declarative UI và pure functions để hiểu component-based rendering hoạt động ra sao.

milestones.title: JSX & Components
milestones.description: Đi qua JSX, component composition, props và cách mô tả UI bằng một component tree rõ ràng, dễ tái sử dụng.

milestones.title: State & Events
milestones.description: Học event handling, useState, controlled interaction và hiểu khi nào React re-render để UI thực sự sống động.

milestones.title: Effects, Refs, Context
milestones.description: Làm việc với useEffect, useRef, context và các tình huống cần đồng bộ React với môi trường bên ngoài.

milestones.title: Performance & Optimization
milestones.description: Tối ưu production app bằng useReducer, referential equality, memoization, store sync và những kỹ thuật giảm render không cần thiết.

milestones.title: Custom Hooks
milestones.description: Tách reactive logic thành custom hooks sạch hơn, dễ tái sử dụng hơn và phù hợp với codebase lớn hơn.

milestones.title: Practical Hooks
milestones.description: Củng cố bằng các hook thực tế như data fetching, event listener, idle state, mouse state và nhiều pattern hay gặp trong app thật.

milestones.title: Concurrent Rendering
milestones.description: Hiểu useDeferredValue, startTransition, useTransition, actions và optimistic UI trong mô hình concurrent React hiện đại.

milestones.title: Server Components / Next.js Bridge
milestones.description: Bắc cầu sang Next.js với server components, server actions và cách chia ranh giới client/server trong React hiện đại.

milestones.title: Interview Prep
milestones.description: Khóa kiến thức bằng interview prep, challenge và practice items để biến phần học thành khả năng giải thích và triển khai thật.

outcomes: Có một React roadmap rõ ràng từ mental model tới interview prep.
Đi từ UI fundamentals đến hooks, concurrent rendering và server components.
Nối phần học React với practice-heavy interview prep thay vì chỉ học lý thuyết.
Xây nền tốt hơn để ship modern frontend app production-ready.

support.title: Phù hợp cho ai?
support.description: Phù hợp với người đã biết JavaScript cơ bản và muốn học React hiện đại theo một progression rõ ràng, có thứ tự và dễ bám theo.
items: Người muốn có roadmap React mạch lạc thay vì nhảy giữa nhiều tutorial rời rạc
Frontend developer muốn cập nhật hooks hiện đại, server components và performance thinking
Người đang chuẩn bị question bank và interview prep cho vị trí frontend

en.name: React Roadmap
en.summary: Frontend track for building modern UI, mastering hooks, performance, server components, and interview prep.

milestones.title: Mental Model
milestones.description: Build the foundation with Why React, Thinking in React, declarative UI, and pure functions so the component mental model feels natural.

milestones.title: JSX & Components
milestones.description: Work through JSX, component composition, props, and the structure needed to describe UI with reusable component trees.

milestones.title: State & Events
milestones.description: Learn event handling, useState, interaction patterns, and how React rendering works once your UI becomes dynamic.

milestones.title: Effects, Refs, Context
milestones.description: Use effects, refs, and context for the situations where React has to coordinate with external state, browser APIs, and shared data.

milestones.title: Performance & Optimization
milestones.description: Optimize production apps with reducers, referential equality, memoization, store syncing, and techniques that prevent unnecessary rendering.

milestones.title: Custom Hooks
milestones.description: Extract reactive logic into custom hooks that are easier to reuse, reason about, and scale across a larger codebase.

milestones.title: Practical Hooks
milestones.description: Reinforce the material with practical hooks for fetching, events, idle state, mouse state, and patterns that show up in real apps.

milestones.title: Concurrent Rendering
milestones.description: Understand useDeferredValue, startTransition, useTransition, actions, and optimistic UI in the modern concurrent React model.

milestones.title: Server Components / Next.js Bridge
milestones.description: Bridge into Next.js through server components, server actions, and better client/server boundaries for modern React apps.

milestones.title: Interview Prep
milestones.description: Lock in the material with interview prep, challenges, and practice items so knowledge turns into explanation and implementation skill.

outcomes: Follow a React roadmap from mental model through interview prep.
Move from UI fundamentals into hooks, concurrent rendering, and server components.
Connect concept learning to practice-heavy interview preparation.
Build a stronger path toward shipping modern, production-ready frontend apps.

support.title: Who is this for?
support.description: A strong fit for developers who already know basic JavaScript and want a modern React progression with a clear, structured learning order.
items: Learners who want a coherent React roadmap instead of disconnected tutorials
Frontend developers catching up on modern hooks, server components, and performance thinking
Developers preparing for question-bank style interview prep in frontend roles

ja.name: React Roadmap
ja.role: フロントエンド開発者
ja.summary: modern UI を作り、hooks、performance、server components、interview prep を身につけるための frontend track です。

milestones.title: Mental Model
milestones.description: Why React、Thinking in React、declarative UI、pure functions から始めて、component ベースの考え方を固めます。

milestones.title: JSX & Components
milestones.description: JSX、component composition、props を通して、再利用しやすい UI 構造を組み立てられるようにします。

milestones.title: State & Events
milestones.description: event handling、useState、インタラクション設計、そして React の render の流れを理解します。

milestones.title: Effects, Refs, Context
milestones.description: effects、refs、context を使って、外部状態や browser APIs と React をつなぐ場面に対応します。

milestones.title: Performance & Optimization
milestones.description: reducers、referential equality、memoization、store sync などを通して production app の最適化を学びます。

milestones.title: Custom Hooks
milestones.description: reactive logic を custom hooks として切り出し、再利用性と見通しを高めます。

milestones.title: Practical Hooks
milestones.description: fetching、events、idle state、mouse state などの practical hooks を通して理解を深めます。

milestones.title: Concurrent Rendering
milestones.description: useDeferredValue、startTransition、useTransition、actions、optimistic UI を通して concurrent React を理解します。

milestones.title: Server Components / Next.js Bridge
milestones.description: server components、server actions、client/server boundary を通して Next.js とのつながりを整理します。

milestones.title: Interview Prep
milestones.description: interview prep、challenges、practice items を通して、知識を説明力と実装力に変えていきます。

outcomes: mental model から interview prep まで一貫して進める React roadmap です。
UI fundamentals から hooks、concurrent rendering、server components まで段階的に学べます。
概念理解を practice-heavy な interview prep へつなげられます。
modern で production-ready な frontend app を作る土台を強化できます。

support.title: こんな人におすすめ
support.description: 基本的な JavaScript は理解していて、modern React を段階的かつ体系的に学びたい人に向いています。
items: 断片的な tutorial ではなく一貫した React roadmap が欲しい学習者
modern hooks、server components、performance thinking を整理したい frontend developer
question-bank 型の interview prep を進めたい人
